---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cosmo
    css: style.css
---

# A measure-valued branching model of stabilizing selection and logistic growth

<!--
<div align="middle">
<a href="https://www.openprocessing.org/sketch/396443"><img src="images/three.png" height="300" width="500"/></a>
</div>
-->

<center><iframe src="https://editor.p5js.org/bobweek/embed/I6sh2Z5nT" width="605" height="605"></iframe></center>

<p align=justify style="background-color:#2E2E2E;
border-radius:4px;
font-size:16px;
padding:15px;
margin:5px;"><b>
Description under construction!
</b>
</p>
